title: Receiving Notifications or Alerts tied to Locations
excerpt: It would be great if we could set notifications to send alerts by location. If we have multiple tasks to be completed at a location, nothing would get missed if a notification was issues of showing the tasks by that loca…

posts.author: KDoering (Kasie Doering)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be great if we could set notifications to send alerts by location. If we have multiple tasks to be completed at a location, nothing would get missed if a notification was issues of showing the tasks by that location.
